prompt: test the search — i just added brave search support and want to make sure it actually works alongside pexels

assertions.text: Report identifies Brave as active provider (not Tavily)
POST /api/search hit with at least 1 query, full response body logged
POST /api/search/images hit, Pexels results logged with image details
POST /api/search/download-image tested with a real image URL from Pexels
SSRF probes executed: localhost (127.0.0.1), AWS metadata (169.254.169.254), private IP (10.x)
Blocked domain probe executed (e.g. pornhub URL)
Error paths tested: empty query → 400, no auth → 401, missing fields → 400
Response times logged for each search endpoint
